title: ayenia nummularia
intro: Ayenia nummularia, also known as Money Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ayenia nummularia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Ayenia nummularia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
